claims.claim_summary: Wheat should be harvested between 20% and 14% grain moisture.

claims.evidence_text: Consider harvesting at 18% to 20% moisture and artificially drying the grain.
claims.claim_summary: Consider harvesting at 18-20% moisture and artificially drying the grain.

claims.evidence_text: Fields infected with head scab may require additional combine adjustments to remove infected seed. Wheat spikes with symptoms of Fusarium head blight (head scab).
claims.claim_summary: Fields with Fusarium head blight (head scab) require combine adjustments to remove infected seed at harvest.
